Toxin

Botulax 100u

Premium type A botulinum toxin from Hugel. Known for rapid onset and high patient satisfaction.

Liquid Toxin

Innotox 50u

World's first liquid formulation botulinum toxin type A. No reconstitution required.

Rejuran Healer

PN (Polynucleotide) based skin booster for intense cellular regeneration and elasticity improvement.
